Statement of Purpose — Czech Republic Government Scholarships

Growing up in Kenya, I have always been driven by a desire to create meaningful change within my community and beyond. My journey in your field began with a curiosity that has since matured into a focused commitment to addressing real-world challenges.

Background & Motivation: Personal Statement

Goals & Vision: your career goals

Why This Scholarship: The Czech Republic Government Scholarships represents a unique opportunity to gain world-class training and bring that knowledge back to where it is needed most.

Sincerely, Applicant

Growing up in Kenya, I have always been driven by a desire to create meaningful change within my community and beyond. My journey in Computer Science began with a curiosity that has since matured into a focused commitment to addressing real-world challenges.

essays.prompt: When I was a kid, there was one question I could never escape — from mum's friends, dad's relatives, everyone — "what do you want to be when you grow up?" My answer never changed: a neurosurgeon. I was going to study the brain, operate on it, save lives with my hands. I worked toward that with everything I had. Then biology happened. One subject stood between me and medicine, and I did not pass it. Most people would call that the end of a dream. I called it a redirection. I enrolled to study Mathematics and Computer Science, and the moment I started engaging with what computing could actually do, I stopped mourning what I had lost. Something bigger was coming into focus. The intersection of AI and healthcare found me before I found it. I spent hours reading research on how machine learning was transforming diagnostics, how computer vision was detecting cancers radiologists were missing, how neural networks were learning to read MRI scans with precision that took human experts years to develop. I realised I did not need to hold a scalpel to help a surgeon. I could build the intelligence that helps them decide where to cut. My undergraduate programme did not offer much in the way of AI, so I built my own curriculum. Through Coursera, Udemy, Cognitive Class, and Udacity, I worked through machine learning foundations, neural network architectures, NLP pipelines, and computer vision frameworks. I earned certifications, but more than that I earned fluency. I learned what it feels like when a model converges after days of training, when a convolutional network correctly identifies a tumour class it has never seen before, when the work stops being academic and starts feeling like something that could matter in the real world.

**Strengths:** Personal narrative from Kenya provides authentic perspective. Focus on Computer Science aligns well with scholarship goals.

**Areas for Improvement:** Consider adding more specific examples. Strengthen the connection between past experience and future goals.

**Next Steps:** Proceed to the Polish stage for final refinements.
